title: B1 Listening - Part 1 - Test 26
instructions: For each question, listen to the recording and choose the correct answer: A, B or C.

items.context: You hear two friends arranging a school meeting.
items.audio_script: Man: Are we still meeting in classroom eight for the student council meeting? I wrote it down yesterday, but I have not checked today's message. || Woman: That was the original plan, but classroom eight is being painted today. [1]We need to meet in the library meeting room instead[/1].. || Man: Good thing I asked. I nearly went to the old place and waited there. What about the computer room? || Woman: No, nobody will be waiting there. I will arrive a few minutes early and message you if anything changes again before we start.
items.question: Where will the meeting take place?
items.explanation: The meeting will take place in the library meeting room.

items.context: You hear two students preparing for a music performance.
items.audio_script: Girl: Have you packed for the music performance tonight yet? I put my guitar stand in my bag because I thought that was what we needed. || Boy: That was mentioned earlier, but the school already provides music stands for us. [2]Everyone needs to wear a black shirt tonight[/2].. || Girl: I am glad I checked. I nearly left my bag by the door. Do I need a music stand as well? || Boy: No, that is not necessary. Put the new item in tonight and check the message once more before you leave in the morning.
items.question: What should the student bring?
items.explanation: The student should bring a black shirt.

items.context: You hear two friends planning a birthday celebration.
items.audio_script: Boy: Are we still going to have a barbecue this weekend? I told my family I would be out this afternoon. || Girl: That was our first plan, but the weather forecast says there will be strong winds. We also thought about whether to go to a restaurant. || Boy: So what have we decided? I need to tell my brother soon. || Girl: [3]We are having an indoor picnic instead[/3].. I will check the times online tonight and send you a message before we meet. || Boy: Great. That sounds easier than the other ideas.
items.question: What are they going to do?
items.explanation: They decide to have an indoor picnic.

items.context: You hear two people talking about a coach trip.
items.audio_script: Woman: I need to check the time for the coach to the castle. I wrote down eight fifteen, but I am not sure it is correct. || Man: It changed this morning because the driver has to collect another group first. [4]The coach leaves at eight forty-five now[/4]., and we should arrive ten minutes earlier. || Woman: I am glad I asked. I would have arrived at the wrong time and waited there. || Man: I will send you a reminder later. Bring everything you need, because there may not be time to go home first.
items.question: What time does the coach leave?
items.explanation: The coach leaves at eight forty-five.

items.context: You hear two friends talking about a tablet.
items.audio_script: Man: How are you getting on with your tablet? I heard there was a problem with it yesterday. || Woman: I first thought the charging cable was broken, and my brother wondered whether the screen was damaged. But someone checked it carefully this morning. [5]It keeps turning itself off after a few minutes[/5].. || Man: Can it be repaired soon? You said you needed it for the online course tomorrow. || Woman: Yes, probably. Now we know what is wrong, it should be ready tomorrow. That is a relief, because I cannot manage without it.
items.question: What is wrong with the tablet?
items.explanation: The tablet keeps turning itself off.

items.context: You hear two friends travelling to a sports centre.
items.audio_script: Girl: How are you getting to the sports centre? I thought you were planning to travel by bus. || Boy: I was, but the bus is delayed and the centre is only ten minutes away. I also considered going by taxi. [6]I am going to walk instead[/6].. || Girl: That sounds sensible. What time do you expect to arrive there? || Boy: Just before eleven, if everything is on time. I checked the journey online, so I will message you when I leave home. || Girl: Good. I will wait near the entrance so you can find me easily.
items.question: How will the speaker get to the sports centre?
items.explanation: The speaker will walk to the sports centre.

items.context: You hear two friends choosing breakfast in a café.
items.audio_script: Boy: Have you chosen what to order? The queue is moving quickly, and we need to leave soon. || Girl: I nearly chose toast, and I also looked at a bowl of cereal, but there is no bread left and I had cereal at home yesterday. || Boy: So what are you going to have? I need to choose mine before we reach the counter. || Girl: [7]I will have the yoghurt with fruit[/7].. It should be enough for me, and then we can find somewhere quiet to sit before we go.
items.question: What will the speaker have?
items.explanation: The speaker chooses a yoghurt with fruit.
